issues.title: Loan Simple leads receiving duplicate tasks in pre-referral and post-referral workflows
issues.desc: Loan Simple leads were generating double tasks across multiple workflows including pre-referral and post-referral. The issue was caused by a bugged filter related to Loan Simple lead associations in HubSpot. HubSpot support was engaged and confirmed a fix was applied.
issues.workaround: Review any LS leads that received duplicate tasks during the impact window and manually close or dismiss the duplicate tasks.

issues.title: Post-referral workflow tasks not stopping when deal marked Closed Lost or Transferred
issues.desc: HAs were receiving post-referral workflow check-in tasks even after deals had been marked as Closed Lost or Transferred. The workflow filters were not correctly excluding these deal stages from triggering ongoing tasks. A tweak to the workflow filters was made to resolve the issue.
issues.workaround: Manually unenroll any Closed Lost or Transferred deals from the post-referral workflow if they are still generating tasks.

issues.title: Offer Accepted workflow not re-triggering TC tasks when deal stage toggled back and forth
issues.desc: When a deal was moved to Offer Accepted, then back to a prior stage, and then back to Offer Accepted again, the TC workflow tasks did not re-trigger. This was because 'deal stage = offer accepted' was missing as a re-enrollment criterion in the workflow. The re-enrollment criteria was updated to include offer accepted as a trigger.
issues.workaround: Manually enroll any affected deals into the TC workflow to generate the closing info collection tasks.

issues.title: Automated emails showing previous loan officer after LO reassignment
issues.desc: After a loan officer change on a deal, automated emails sent to agents continued to reference the previous LO rather than the newly assigned one. The issue was identified as a product-level problem and was resolved by Luis. The correct LO (Julie Yocum) was not reflected until after the fix.
issues.workaround: Manually send corrected agent emails referencing the updated LO for any deals where the LO was changed during the impact window.

issues.title: MRC deals marked Offer Accepted not enrolling TCs into workflow tasks
issues.desc: MRC deals updated to Offer Accepted were failing to trigger TC workflow enrollment and task generation. HubSpot support was contacted and the issue was confirmed fixed after their intervention. The root cause was not explicitly stated, though missing lender assignment was speculated as a potential factor.
issues.workaround: Manually enroll any MRC deals marked Offer Accepted between approximately 2026-03-14 and 2026-04-01 into the TC workflow and send closing info collection emails manually.
